frame_analyses.description: Initial setup view showing FLS trainer with gauze pattern visible on elevated posts. Black and green instruments visible entering field.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard FLS peg board setup with gauze suspended between posts

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper (green) securing gauze while right instrument (black) appears to be scissors approaching for cutting
Scissors making initial entry cut into gauze material. Green rope/string visible woven through posts.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut appears to be initiated at appropriate starting point

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing along circular pattern. Multiple posts now have green string threaded through them in systematic pattern.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion following curved path

frame_analyses.description: Continued cutting with good instrument coordination. Pattern of cuts becoming more evident.
Cutting continues around circular pattern. Green material being systematically cut and threaded.
Final stages of cutting with pattern nearly complete. All posts show green material threaded through systematically.
Task appears completed with green material forming complete pattern through all posts. Instruments withdrawing.

confidence_rationale: Video quality and angle make it impossible to assess precise cutting accuracy relative to marked lines. Cannot determine if cuts are within required 2mm tolerance. Task completion and gauze attachment clearly visible.
cannot_determine: Exact deviation measurements from marked cutting line at cardinal points
Precise cutting accuracy within 2mm tolerance requirement
Visibility of actual marked circle pattern on gauze
technique_summary: Excellent time performance at 93 seconds (expert level). Smooth instrument coordination and systematic approach to cutting. Unable to assess cutting precision due to video resolution and angle limitations.
strengths: Systematic approach to circular cutting pattern
improvement_suggestions: Assessment limited by video quality - precision evaluation not possible from this footage
